notes:
- Sites Logins: per-host credential vault
- Authorization: Basic header preempt-sent on every matching request
- Subdomain match via leading dot (.example.com matches cdn.example.com)
- Passwords DPAPI-encrypted at rest in HKCU
- Caller-provided Authorization headers always win over the vault
- Minimize-to-tray: window hides on minimize and lives in the system tray
- Tray menu: Show / Pause all / Resume all / Exit
